The Role Shift
Interactive Pitch
Scene 1 of 10

First, the bad news
In a good way

▶
A bold next step

The Bad News in a Good Way

An interactive case for evolving my role into Senior Director, Learning Experience & Innovation.

🎯 I would like to step forward into a role built for impact.
The opportunity

We built a strong production engine.

Over the past five years, the Institute of Learning has scaled significantly—expanding its portfolio, increasing reach, and building a high-performing team capable of delivering high-quality education at scale.

📚Expanded portfolio
👥Increased reach
🏆High-performing team
The gap

Scaling production ≠ optimizing experience.

While production has scaled effectively, learning experience quality and engagement are not yet consistently optimized across all offerings.

❌ Engagement varies
❌ Learning experience is inconsistent
❌ Impact is not fully maximized
Our learners’ experiences

They value the information.
But engagement is the gap.

When a learner says the education is useful but easy to tune out, that is not a content problem. It is an experience-design opportunity.

“Great information… but not very engaging.”

This is the moment the proposed role is built to address: turning necessary education into learning experiences people actually stay with.

📧 Learners multitask when the experience feels passive.
🎯 Better design can increase attention, completion, and impact.
The proposal

Evolve the role into Senior Director, Learning Experience & Innovation.

This new position would focus on the design quality, engagement, and effectiveness of learning.

🎨

Design Quality

Establish consistent learning experience standards across courses, webinars, and programs.

⚡

Engagement

Turn passive content into story-driven, interactive learning moments.

📊

Effectiveness

Connect design decisions to outcomes, learner behavior, and measurable impact.

The business case

Centralize expertise. Reduce reliance. Increase impact.

This role can reduce external instructional design and creative vendor costs while eliminating rework and redesign cycles.

Estimated annual savings
Over $400K

Plus increased efficiency across production workflows.

The innovation engine

This role influences every course, webinar, and program.

🎭

Reimagined Webinars

Story-driven, interactive, and designed to keep learners present.

🧩

Scalable Design Systems

Templates, playbooks, reusable assets, and shared standards.

🧪

New Formats

Microlearning, scenario-based series, and interactive case pathways.

Before and after

From information delivery to learning experience.

Before

This is what many webinars currently look like.

After

This is what they could look like with this new position.

The Waldo moment

In a world full of Waldos, ADA should stand out.

Find and select Chuck.

You found Chuck. Now let's help ADA stand out, too. 🎯

This is not just a title change.

It is a strategic shift toward stronger learning experiences, greater efficiency, and measurable educational impact.
